required_future_phase: P1.7B.22 — Controlled Shadow Implementation Plan or Disabled-By-Default Shadow Wiring Design

feature_flag_config.note: Flag name is draft only — not implemented in this phase

rollout_stages.name: Local Shadow Verification
deliverables: Side-by-side baseline vs NR3+FCC offline report

rollout_stages.name: Internal Dark Launch
constraints: NR3+FCC computed but not exposed to users
Explicit approval before any environment change

rollout_stages.name: Production Activation Review
constraints: Requires explicit user approval before production activation

rollout_stages.name: Production Activation
constraints: Not allowed in current project phase
Must remain blocked until P1.7B.22+ evidence and approval

report_schema.model_version: string — version label for served stack
report_schema.feature_flag_state: string — off | shadow | dark | canary | blocked
report_schema.xG_diff_delta: float — candidate minus baseline total xG

report_frequency_draft.ci_shadow: every CI run on approved branch

monitoring_requirements.implementation_note: Schema and thresholds only — no monitoring code in P1.7B.21

principles: Keep baseline as default production output
Keep NR3+FCC disabled unless explicitly enabled
Disable flag to return to baseline immediately
steps: Set shadow/feature flag to off (when implemented in future phase)
Verify served predictions match baseline stack
Archive shadow logs separately; do not delete baseline history
Delete/revert future activation artifacts if needed
verification_checklist: Baseline xG totals within expected range
No NR3+FCC labels in user-facing output
Cluster rate not regressed to 2.6 band
Rollback logged with timestamp and approver

approval_gates.description: User explicitly approves P1.7B.22 shadow wiring design
Any future flag defaults to off
Separate explicit approval for production activation

go_criteria: NR3+FCC still selected as plan subject
Full regression or approved regression subset passes
no_go_conditions: Any prediction output changes without explicit approval
Any prediction output changes without explicit approval

risk_mitigation_table.mitigation: Monitor Top-K context; do not treat raw pass as achieved
Monitor Top-6/7; do not tune to one match
Use CI in go/no-go; auxiliary datasets non-primary
Do not switch to NR6 on fragile Top-5 pass
Auxiliary only; not sole activation evidence
Flag off by default; explicit approval gates
Implement schema from P1.7B.21 before dark launch
Dark launch first; no user exposure until Stage 5 approval
No flag implementation in P1.7B.21; approval gates G2/G5
Separate stack labels; baseline always served

allowed_in_p1722_with_explicit_approval: Implement a disabled-by-default feature flag (draft name only)
Add shadow-only execution path (no production output change)
future_implementation_boundaries.p1722_entry_condition: User explicitly approves P1.7B.22 after reviewing this plan draft
